label: Despachos Pendientes
info:
=== DESPACHOS PENDIENTES DE FACTURACIÓN ===

ENDPOINTS:
  GET  /api/despachos/health
  GET  /api/despachos/pendientes?days=30
  GET  /api/despachos/pendientes/:remito
  POST /api/despachos/pendientes/:remito/facturar
  GET  /api/despachos/resumen?days=30
  GET  /despachos-pendientes

FUENTES: CORONA.dbo.pr_ezi_remitos + pr_ezi_remitos_items
PATRÓN: queries en msg.payload, throwErrors=1 + Catch node

name: 1. Query health
func:
msg.payload = "SELECT @@SERVERNAME AS server_name, DB_NAME() AS db_name, SCHEMA_NAME() AS schema_name, SYSTEM_USER AS login_user, GETDATE() AS server_time;";
return msg;

name: 2. Format health
1. Validar + query
2. Transformar + resumen
1. Validar remito
2. Ensamblar detalle
1. Validar y armar UPDATE
2. Resultado
1. Query KPIs
2. Query productos
3. Ensamblar resumen
Servir HTML
Error handler
